title: Boundary-Doc Publication Gate History Demotion Execution
objective: Hard-demote the remaining 2026-05-06 Olares Dev Residency boundary-doc publication and host-mirror gate records so those bridge records no longer read like live parent-root publication guidance for the standalone repo boundary.
dependency_note: After Packets 177 and 178 closed the May 2026 summary-gate bridge residue, the next strongest current-looking packet-history family is the smaller 2026-05-06 boundary-doc publication gate layer. These six gate records preserve already-closed governance, dependency-inventory, host-native workflow, README-normalization, build-guidance, and adjacent-authority publication evidence, but their titles and top sections still read like live parent-root publication and host-resync guidance instead of historical provenance with current routing.
execution_scope: Retitle the six targeted Olares Dev Residency publication-gate handoffs as historical boundary-doc publication records and add explicit current-routing blocks.
Retitle the six targeted Olares Dev Residency gate packet JSON titles as historical records and add explicit historical-note and current-routing fields.
Preserve the detailed publication, host-resync, and old-clone observation evidence as provenance rather than rewriting the historical bridge records wholesale.
forbidden_scope: broad 2026-05-06 archive rewriting beyond top-entry demotion and routing context
non-gate execution or decision-record normalization in the same packet
success_criteria: Each targeted boundary-doc handoff now leads as a historical publication-gate record instead of live parent-root publication guidance.
Each targeted boundary-doc packet JSON now carries explicit historical-note and current-routing context instead of reading like a still-live gate definition.
Repo-owned status routing records the family closure and leaves any remaining non-gate or separately bounded residue for fresh reassessment afterward.
validation_commands: Select-String -Path ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-084-packet-083-authority-publication-and-host-mirror-resync-gate-handoff.md,ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-086-packet-085-authority-publication-and-host-mirror-resync-gate-handoff.md,ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-088-packet-087-authority-publication-and-host-mirror-resync-gate-handoff.md,ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-090-packet-089-authority-publication-and-host-mirror-resync-gate-handoff.md,ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-092-packet-091-authority-publication-and-host-mirror-resync-gate-handoff.md,ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-094-packet-093-authority-publication-and-host-mirror-resync-gate-handoff.md -Pattern '^# Historical Olares Dev Residency','^Current routing:'
next_action: Reassess the remaining earlier 2026-05-06 Olares Dev Residency publication-gate and adjacent packet-history surfaces for the next smallest current-looking historical family that still lacks equivalent current-routing context.
